summary: Frontend-only testing of 8 new TransformationSection changes. All 9 specified requirements verified via Playwright + DOM inspection on 1280x800 viewport.

test_results.circle_size_450px: PASS - All 4 individual circles are exactly 450x450px (style_width: '450px' confirmed)
test_results.heading_font_24_30px: PASS - clamp(24px, 2.4vw, 30px) resolves to 30px at 1280px viewport
test_results.subtext_font_14_18px: PASS - clamp(14px, 1.4vw, 18px) resolves to ~17.92px at 1280px viewport (within 14-18px range)
test_results.wavy_connector_paths: PASS - Double cubic bezier confirmed: 'M 22,51 C 36,44 43,63 50,52 C 57,41 65,63 78,55', wavy line visually confirmed in screenshot
test_results.lr_lr_alternating_positions: PASS - Circle1: left:22% (LEFT), Circle2: left:78% (RIGHT), Circle3: left:22% (LEFT), Circle4: left:78% (RIGHT)
test_results.section_500vh: PASS - Section height 4000px = 500vh on 800px viewport height
test_results.final_row_4_circles: PASS - Final row visible at 92% scroll progress with 4 small circles (178px style) in a horizontal row with connector line behind them
test_results.header_and_circle1_simultaneously: PASS - At section entry (scroll=3862px): header ('What Becomes Possible') visible AND circle1 opacity:1 visible simultaneously (screenshot confirmed)
test_results.no_ghost_dots: PASS - Circles 2, 3, 4 all opacity:0 at initial section entry, no ghost dots

context_for_next_testing_agent: TransformationSection uses framer-motion sticky scroll. Section at ~3862px from top, 4000px tall (500vh). Preloader takes ~4s. All 8 new requirements pass. Circle positions: C1/C3 left:22%, C2/C4 left:78%. Final row at scrollProgress 0.82-0.94. Viewport 1280x800 used.
